record.field: Ghost is a free and open source, professional publishing platform built on a modern Node.js technology stack.

services: ghost: image: ghost:6-alpine restart: always environment: database__client: mysql database__connection__host: db database__connection__user: root database__connection__password: example database__connection__database: ghost url: http://${GHOST_HOST} volumes: - ./ghost:/var/lib/ghost/content container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:2368' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network db: image: mysql:8.0 restart: always environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: example volumes: - ./db:/var/lib/mysql container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_db' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail # Dump consistente de MySQL/MariaDB (servicio en marcha) → $BACKUP_DATA_DIR docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'exec mysqldump -uroot -p"$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD" --single-transaction --all-databases' \ > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "mysqldump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.sql") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail docker compose up -d db for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'mysqladmin ping -uroot -p"$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD" --silent' && break sleep 2 done docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'exec mysql -uroot -p"$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD"' < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.sql" echo "restore MySQL OK"
